narrative:
Union Township has 7,028 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.9 percentage points.
